solution.headingLead: Our AI Care Managers turn your waiting list into
solution.subheading: They enroll every patient autonomously, coach them through the crucial weeks, and keep supporting them through recovery, while your surgical team focuses on the clinical procedures.

cards.label: saved for one NHS Trust in 3 months

steps.heading: Enroll patients before they even think to ask.
steps.body: The moment a surgery is scheduled in your system, Intelligence picks it up and enrollment starts automatically — no manual referrals, or patient actions required before preparation starts.

steps.heading: Coach every patient through the weeks that matter.
steps.body: Across voice, SMS, email and chat, Intelligence guides each patient through their own preparation plan — answering questions, sending reminders and keeping momentum, without adding to your team's workload.

steps.heading: Spot the patients who need attention first.
steps.body: Real-time EHR integration lets Intelligence read every signal and predict surgical risk, surfacing the patients most likely to face complications or cancellation so your team can act early.

steps.heading: A care manager that never sleeps.
steps.body: Patients reach Intelligence whenever they need it, and it reaches back in their own language, on their own channel — turning weeks of silence into continuous, two-way support.

steps.heading: Stay with every patient long after discharge.
steps.body: Intelligence follows each patient home, monitoring recovery, flagging warning signs early and keeping a human coach in the loop — so readmissions drop and outcomes hold.
